name: Cheesy Sausage Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked and drained pork sausage with the cream cheese, cheddar cheese, green onion, Bisquick Baking Mix, 2 eggs, and 2/3 cup milk in a large bowl. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
2. Pour the egg and milk mixture into the bowl, stirring just until moistened.
3. Spoon the batter into greased miniature muffin pans, filling each about 3/4 full.
4. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
5. Remove the muffins from the pan immediately after baking. Makes 2 dozen.
